     The Numbers Business Report

Focus (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $53,862,963Details
International Box Office $114,202,737
Worldwide Box Office $168,065,700
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,619,459
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,401,136
Total $8,020,595
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Nicky, a seasoned master of misdirection becomes romantically involved with novice con artist Jess. As he’s teaching her the tricks of the trade, she gets too close for comfort and he abruptly breaks it off. Three years later, the former flame—now an accomplished femme fatale—shows up in Buenos Aires in the middle of the high stakes racecar circuit. In the midst of Nicky’s latest, very dangerous scheme, she throws his plans for a loop…and the consummate con man off his game.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,685,137 (34.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.88 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$65,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,323 opening theaters/3,323 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $76,417,678

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 27th, 2015 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
February 27th, 2015 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: February 26th, 2015 (Wide) (Netherlands)
February 26th, 2015 (Wide) (South Korea)

February 26th, 2015 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: May 12th, 2015 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language, some sexual content and brief violence.
(Rating bulletin 2332, 7/23/2014)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Auto Racing, Confidence Men, Dysfunctional Family, Mentor, Professional Rivalry, Romance
Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Di Novi Pictures, Zaftig Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Nicky, a seasoned master of misdirection becomes romantically involved with novice con artist Jess. As he’s teaching her the tricks of the trade, she gets too close for comfort and he abruptly breaks it off. Three years later, the former flame—now an accomplished femme fatale—shows up in Buenos Aires in the middle of the high stakes racecar circuit. In the midst of Nicky’s latest, very dangerous scheme, she throws his plans for a loop…and the consummate con man off his game.
